What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker, branded for Corsha K and organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

What it is not

Not a full CRM replacement. It is the small working board for follow-ups that otherwise live in forms, email, notes, or memory.

How to read the screenshots

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.
